## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between Hellobdv and GrowthX for AI-assisted content creation for a new women's supplement brand.](https://fathom.video/share/HyjTqZ9XXEsusfyvhEMxdyJrkZ4GQNsx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Hellobdv needs \~75-100 pieces of content (blog posts + ingredient pages) for launch in late September](https://fathom.video/share/HyjTqZ9XXEsusfyvhEMxdyJrkZ4GQNsx?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation with human expertise and review processes](https://fathom.video/share/HyjTqZ9XXEsusfyvhEMxdyJrkZ4GQNsx?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Initial 6-8 week pilot (\~$20-30k) proposed to test quality and scalability](https://fathom.video/share/HyjTqZ9XXEsusfyvhEMxdyJrkZ4GQNsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Hellobdv has existing research/guidelines; looking for efficient content production partner](https://fathom.video/share/HyjTqZ9XXEsusfyvhEMxdyJrkZ4GQNsx?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Topics

### Hellobdv's Content Needs

  - [Launching women's supplement brand targeting specific age groups/life stages](https://fathom.video/share/HyjTqZ9XXEsusfyvhEMxdyJrkZ4GQNsx?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [Need \~5-10 articles in each of 5 blog topic areas](https://fathom.video/share/HyjTqZ9XXEsusfyvhEMxdyJrkZ4GQNsx?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Require ingredient glossary pages with benefits, products, and citations](https://fathom.video/share/HyjTqZ9XXEsusfyvhEMxdyJrkZ4GQNsx?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Content must be science-backed and medically reviewed](https://fathom.video/share/HyjTqZ9XXEsusfyvhEMxdyJrkZ4GQNsx?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [Goal: Build credibility and eventually leverage SEO as growth channel](https://fathom.video/share/HyjTqZ9XXEsusfyvhEMxdyJrkZ4GQNsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)

### GrowthX's Offering

  - [AI-assisted content creation with human expertise in the loop](https://fathom.video/share/HyjTqZ9XXEsusfyvhEMxdyJrkZ4GQNsx?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Break down writing process into steps with multiple human reviews](https://fathom.video/share/HyjTqZ9XXEsusfyvhEMxdyJrkZ4GQNsx?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Can potentially source medical reviewers if needed](https://fathom.video/share/HyjTqZ9XXEsusfyvhEMxdyJrkZ4GQNsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Offer strategy development and scalable content production](https://fathom.video/share/HyjTqZ9XXEsusfyvhEMxdyJrkZ4GQNsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Additional services: case studies, content distribution, audience building](https://fathom.video/share/HyjTqZ9XXEsusfyvhEMxdyJrkZ4GQNsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1623.0)

### Proposed Pilot Project

  - [6-8 week initial engagement to prove capability](https://fathom.video/share/HyjTqZ9XXEsusfyvhEMxdyJrkZ4GQNsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Deliverables: Content strategy + 25-30 articles/pages](https://fathom.video/share/HyjTqZ9XXEsusfyvhEMxdyJrkZ4GQNsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
  - [Cost estimate: $20-30k (to be refined based on requirements)](https://fathom.video/share/HyjTqZ9XXEsusfyvhEMxdyJrkZ4GQNsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
  - [Goal: Establish workflow and quality bar for ongoing partnership](https://fathom.video/share/HyjTqZ9XXEsusfyvhEMxdyJrkZ4GQNsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### Brand and Quality Considerations

  - [Hellobdv has strong brand guidelines to follow](https://fathom.video/share/HyjTqZ9XXEsusfyvhEMxdyJrkZ4GQNsx?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [GrowthX can create on-brand visuals and infographics](https://fathom.video/share/HyjTqZ9XXEsusfyvhEMxdyJrkZ4GQNsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
  - [Focus on authoritative, trustworthy content presentation](https://fathom.video/share/HyjTqZ9XXEsusfyvhEMxdyJrkZ4GQNsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1937.0)
  - [Potential to build branded publication for enhanced credibility](https://fathom.video/share/HyjTqZ9XXEsusfyvhEMxdyJrkZ4GQNsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1951.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Hellobdv to send NDA and share detailed product/content information](https://fathom.video/share/HyjTqZ9XXEsusfyvhEMxdyJrkZ4GQNsx?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [GrowthX to review materials and develop tailored proposal](https://fathom.video/share/HyjTqZ9XXEsusfyvhEMxdyJrkZ4GQNsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1937.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up call to discuss proposal and potential engagement](https://fathom.video/share/HyjTqZ9XXEsusfyvhEMxdyJrkZ4GQNsx?tab=summary&timestamp=2004.0)
  - [Aim to move quickly given Hellobdv's late September launch timeline](https://fathom.video/share/HyjTqZ9XXEsusfyvhEMxdyJrkZ4GQNsx?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
